title: Random Item
description: Gives everyone a random item at the end of the timer.
body:
Gives everyone a random item at the end of the timer. ![Timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f41a7da7ea9b917120892f1a4f952f1b5d5072a.png) ### If you want to commision a mod, message @u1timatej7 on Discord.
The timer is configurable and defaults to 30 seconds. The timer length can be changed in game with the /timer command The mod is only needed on the server side, so you can play it with vanilla minecraft. With LAN worlds, only the host needs the mod installed. This idea is based on Wilbur Soot's video:
